steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says summer squash "shows so little resemblance to any wild plant that genetic research was necessary to ______ the wild Johnny gourd as its ancestor." The blank needs a verb meaning to establish or verify a relationship that wasn't visually obvious.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'confirm': genetic research confirming the Johnny gourd as the ancestor fits perfectly — it verified a hidden relationship. ✓
  • Choice B — 'acquire': you acquire something you don't have; genetic research doesn't acquire an ancestor. ✗
  • Choice C — 'develop': develop implies creating or cultivating something, not identifying an ancestral link. ✗
  • Choice D — 'attract': attract means to draw something toward you; unrelated to identifying ancestry. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
